use_cases: Displaying user profile pictures in navigation headers and user menus
Showing user avatars in comment sections and activity feeds
Representing users in team member lists and contact directories
Displaying avatars in notification systems and chat interfaces
Providing user identification in dashboard sidebar and profile sections
ai_summary: A minimal, accessible avatar component built on Radix UI primitives that displays user profile images with automatic fallback to initials when images fail to load. The component uses a simple rounded-full design with configurable sizing and supports composition through separate AvatarImage and AvatarFallback subcomponents.
